# zenjxl public API — additions from non-default features
# features: butteraugli-loop,decode,encode,jpeg-lossy,parallel,reconstruct-hdr,threads,zencodec
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 1
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        13
#   free functions                              5
#   inherent methods                           15
#   struct fields                               7
#   enum variants                               8
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)        30
#   auto-trait-complete types                   7
#   auto-trait exceptions                       5
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                           23
#   jpeg_lossy                       26

## items (49 lines)

pub mod jpeg_lossy
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric
pub jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric::Butteraugli
pub jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric::Cvvdp
pub jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric::ZensimA
pub fn jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric::approx_relative_target(self, f32, f32) -> f32
pub fn jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric::higher_is_better(self) -> bool
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum jpeg_lossy::JpegRecompressMethod
pub jpeg_lossy::JpegRecompressMethod::Auto
pub jpeg_lossy::JpegRecompressMethod::Coarsen
pub jpeg_lossy::JpegRecompressMethod::Reencode
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Inferred
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Inferred::abs_level: f32
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Inferred::floor: f32
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Inferred::higher_is_better: bool
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Inferred::relative_target: f32
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Relative
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Relative::higher_is_better: bool
pub jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::Relative::level: f32
pub fn jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget::inferred_preliminary(&[u8], jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric, f32) -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub fn jpeg_lossy::predict_inferred_floor(&[u8], jpeg_lossy::InferredMetric) -> core::option::Option<f32>
pub fn jpeg_lossy::recompress_jpeg_coarsen(&[u8], f32, u8) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub fn jpeg_lossy::recompress_jpeg_lossy(&[u8], jpeg_lossy::JpegRecompressMethod, f32, bool, &jpeg_lossy::RelativeScorer<'_>, u8) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub fn jpeg_lossy::recompress_jpeg_lossy_relative(&[u8], f32, bool, &jpeg_lossy::RelativeScorer<'_>, u8) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub fn jpeg_lossy::recompress_jpeg_lossy_target(&[u8], jpeg_lossy::JpegRecompressMethod, jpeg_lossy::QualityTarget, &jpeg_lossy::RelativeScorer<'_>, u8) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub type jpeg_lossy::RelativeScorer<'a> = (dyn core::ops::function::Fn(&[u8], &[u8], u32, u32) -> f32 + 'a)

pub struct JxlDecoderConfig

## trait impls (12 types)

JxlDecoderConfig: Clone, Debug, Default, zencodec::traits::decoding::DecoderConfig
